title: dioscorea polyclades var. velutina
intro: Dioscorea polyclades var. velutina, also known as Velvet Yam, is a lesser-known variety of yam that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The Velvet Yam is believed to offer health benefits such as reduced stress levels, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its potential health benefits.
